narrative:
Analyzed 3 task(s) across 3 role(s). Best-of-breed upper bound: 51.88/pt scale.
Standardizing on Claude alone covers 98.5% of best-of-breed quality across the whole team.
Allowing exactly two tools (Claude + Gemini) recovers 100.0% of best-of-breed quality -- a marginal improvement over standardizing on one tool.
Existing-platform bonus (+0.75 pts) was applied to tools from: Google.
